title: FOSTER YOUTH RESOURCES - 211info
text: FOSTERCLUB FOSTER YOUTH RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects teens and young adults in and from foster care to resources, people, and organizations that can support basic needs. This includes applying for Medicaid, SNAP, and other services. Please visit www.fosterclub.com/helphub. 620 S Holladay Drive #1 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Current or former foster youth Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 717-1552 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 717-1552 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Navigator Programs * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - FOSTER PARENT ONLINE TRAINING INFORMATION SERVICES - FOSTER PARENT RESOURCES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FOSTERCLUB
